description: This pipeline processes image data by first annotating it with source information, then tracking spots based on annotations, and finally filtering the resulting tracks via custom expressions to refine the output.

a5241596-a4e0-47e0-a31b-22dfc4b976e9.name: trackmate-tracking
a5241596-a4e0-47e0-a31b-22dfc4b976e9.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

83e548a9-4111-45de-860a-ecdaa0a07696.name: annotate-with-source-slot
83e548a9-4111-45de-860a-ecdaa0a07696.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.
